title: tephrothamnus
intro: Tephrothamnus is a genus of flowering plants in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the coffee bush, although they are not closely related to the coffee plant. The leaves and stems of Tephrothamnus have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Tephrothamnus include reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and aiding in digestion. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional African and Asian medicine.
